code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut cur = 0
    mut sign = 1
    mut in_num = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if in_num
            nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
            cur = 0
            sign = 1
            in_num = false
          end
        else if b == 45
          sign = -1
          in_num = true
        else if b == 43
          in_num = true
        else
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          in_num = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
    end

    let count = list.len(nums)
    mut out = ""
    mut j = count - 1
    while j >= 0
      match list.get(nums, j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == count - 1
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j - 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
